label: Add Control
description: Choose a control for this slot.

label: Detect Mac
description: Open setup and scan for SSH hosts.

label: Text
description: Type or paste text into the frontmost Mac app.

label: Clipboard
description: Send clipboard text between phone and Mac.

label: 🎉 Confetti
description: A decorative celebration button for your deck.

label: ✨ Sparkle
description: A decorative sparkle button for visual rhythm.

label: 💚 Good
description: A friendly emoji marker for favorite sections.

label: Magic
description: A plain decorative button with a little glow.

label: Finder
command: open -a Finder

label: Terminal
command: open -a Terminal

label: Spotlight
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke space using command down'

label: Screenshot
command: screencapture "$HOME/Desktop/Codecks-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).png"
test_command: tmp="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/codecks-screenshot-test.png"; rm -f "$tmp"; screencapture -x "$tmp"; test -s "$tmp"; rm -f "$tmp"; printf 'Screenshot verified'
description: Capture the Mac screen to Desktop.

label: Lock Mac
command: /System/Library/CoreServices/Menu\ Extras/User.menu/Contents/Resources/CGSession -suspend

label: Sleep Display
command: pmset displaysleepnow

label: Screensaver
command: open -a ScreenSaverEngine

label: AirDrop
command: open 'airdrop:'

label: Desktop
command: open "$HOME/Desktop"

label: Downloads
command: open "$HOME/Downloads"

label: Documents
command: open "$HOME/Documents"

label: Settings
command: open -a 'System Settings'

label: Activity
command: open -a 'Activity Monitor'

label: Next App
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 48 using command down'

label: Prev App
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 48 using {shift down, command down}'

label: Space Left
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 123 using control down'

label: Space Right
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 124 using control down'

label: Show Desktop
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 99 using command down'

label: Full Screen
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "f" using {control down, command down}'

label: Copy
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "c" using command down'

label: Paste
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "v" using command down'

label: Mission
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 126 using control down'

label: Play / Pause
description: Play or pause media through the Mac Bluetooth media controls.

label: Next Track
description: Skip to the next track through Bluetooth media controls.

label: Previous Track
description: Return to the previous track through Bluetooth media controls.

label: ChatGPT
command: open 'https://chatgpt.com'

label: GitHub
command: open 'https://github.com'

label: Gmail
command: open 'https://mail.google.com'

label: Calendar
command: open 'https://calendar.google.com'

label: Drive
command: open 'https://drive.google.com'

label: Claude
command: open 'https://claude.ai'

label: New Tab
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "t" using command down'

label: Tab Left
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 48 using {shift down, control down}'
description: Move to the previous browser tab.

label: Tab Right
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 48 using control down'
description: Move to the next browser tab.

label: Reload
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "r" using command down'

label: Browser Back
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 33 using command down'

label: Browser Forward
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 30 using command down'

label: Dev Tools
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "i" using {option down, command down}'

label: Mute
command: osascript -e 'set volume output muted not (output muted of (get volume settings))'

label: Vol +
command: osascript -e 'set volume output volume ((output volume of (get volume settings)) + 8)'

label: Vol -
command: osascript -e 'set volume output volume ((output volume of (get volume settings)) - 8)'

label: Focus 1h
command: dir="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}"; nohup caffeinate -dimsu -t 3600 >"$dir/codecks-focus.log" 2>&1 & printf '%s' "$!" >"$dir/codecks-caffeinate.pid"
description: Keep the Mac awake for one hour and remember only this session.

label: Stop Focus
command: pid_file="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/codecks-caffeinate.pid"; if test -f "$pid_file"; then pid="$(cat "$pid_file")"; if ps -p "$pid" -o comm= | grep -q 'caffeinate'; then kill "$pid"; fi; rm -f "$pid_file"; fi
description: Stop only the Focus session started by Codecks.

label: Coding Setup
command: open -a Terminal; open 'https://github.com'; open 'https://chatgpt.com'
description: Open Terminal, GitHub, and ChatGPT using installed/default apps.

label: Meeting Setup
command: open -a Calendar; open 'https://meet.google.com'
description: Open Calendar and Google Meet in your default browser.

label: Browser Setup
command: open 'https://github.com/notifications'
description: Open GitHub notifications in your default browser.

label: Notifications
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell application process "ControlCenter" to click (first menu bar item of menu bar 1 whose description is "Clock")'
test_command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell application process "ControlCenter" to exists (first menu bar item of menu bar 1 whose description is "Clock")' | grep true >/dev/null && printf 'Notification Center available'
description: Open Notification Center from the macOS clock.

label: Control Center
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell application process "ControlCenter" to click (first menu bar item of menu bar 1 whose description contains "Control Center")'
test_command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to exists application process "ControlCenter"' | grep true >/dev/null && printf 'Control Center available'

label: Menu Bar
command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 100 using control down'
test_command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to get UI elements enabled' | grep true >/dev/null && printf 'Menu bar focus available'
